## Scope check

squad-kit stays small on purpose. Please confirm:

- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified below).
- [ ] Does not increase context cost per implementation turn.
- [ ] `.squad/` shape unchanged (or this is a deliberate major-version bump).

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Added or updated tests for changed behaviour
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `docs/` / `CHANGELOG.md` where user-facing behaviour changed
